Name:             postgres-0
Namespace:        default
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             worker-2/10.0.0.11
Labels:           app=postgres
Status:           Pending
Containers:
  postgres:
    Image:      postgres:16
    State:      Waiting
      Reason:   ContainerCreating
    Ready:      False
    Restart Count:  0
Volumes:
  data:
    Type:       PersistentVolumeClaim
    ClaimName:  postgres-data
Events:
  Type     Reason       Age                 From               Message
  Warning  FailedMount  90s                 kubelet            MountVolume.MountDevice failed for volume "pvc-123": rpc error: code = Internal desc = failed to attach volume
